news.summary: A seasoned sales executive with over thirty years of experience, Daryl Allen has been appointed as the Vice President of Sales at Pivot Bio, a prominent agtech company based in St. Louis. This announcement was made on May 29, 2025. Pivot Bio is known for its innovative solutions in the agriculture sector and is recognized as a leader in the field. Allen's role will involve overseeing sales operations and he will report directly to senior management.
news.headline: Pivot Bio names Daryl Allen VP of Sales with 30+ years experience. ST. LOUIS, May 29, 2025. Allen to report directly...

news.summary: In Birmingham, Ala., Medical Properties Trust, Inc. (NYSE: MPW) declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per share of common stock. The dividend will be paid on July 17, 2025, to stockholders of record on June 18, 2025. Medical Properties Trust, Inc. is a self-advised real estate investment trust established in 2003, focusing on acquiring and developing net-leased hospital facilities.
news.headline: Medical Properties Trust declared a $0.08 quarterly dividend per share, payable on July 17, 2025, to stockholders of record on June 18, 2025.

news.summary: Ulta Beauty, Inc. released its first-quarter results, showing a quarterly earnings per share of $6.70, surpassing the consensus estimate of $5.77 by 16.12%. The company's quarterly revenue reached $2.85 billion, exceeding the Street estimate of $2.79 billion. Net sales for the quarter saw a 4.5% increase to $2.8 billion from $2.7 billion, driven by growth in comparable sales and new store contributions, partially offset by a decrease in other revenue. Comparable sales also increased by 2.9% compared to the first quarter of fiscal 2024.
news.headline: Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ: ULTA) Q1 report exceeds expectations with $6.70 EPS and $2.85B revenue, up 4.5% from last year. Stock rises.

news.summary: Zscaler Inc (NASDAQ: ZS) released its Q3 financial results, surpassing expectations. The company reported $678.03 million in revenue, beating the consensus estimate of $666.86 million. Adjusted earnings were 84 cents per share, also exceeding analyst predictions of 75 cents per share. Total revenue saw a 23% increase year-over-year, with deferred revenue rising by 26% to $1.99 billion. Calculated billings grew by 25% to $784.5 million. Cash flow from operations in the quarter reached $211.1 million, while free cash flow was $119.5 million. These figures show a slight decrease from the prior quarter's $123.1 million. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Zscaler surpasses Q3 earnings with $678.03M revenue, beats estimates, and raises guidance; invested more in AI.

news.summary: Pan American Silver Corp. has unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Report, showcasing the company's initiatives in environmental, social, and governance (ESG) aspects. The report, available soon in Spanish and Portuguese, highlights Pan American's achievements, such as a significant decrease in water consumption by more than 220,000 cubic meters compared to the 2024 base figure. This demonstrates the company's commitment to sustainable practices and responsible resource management.
news.headline: Pan American Silver Corp releases 2024 Sustainability Report, highlighting over 220,000 m3 water use reduction.

news.summary: BQE Water Inc., a company specializing in mine water treatment, reported strong financial results for Q1 2025. They saw a significant increase in revenues, with GAAP and Proportional revenues totaling $7.4 million and $7.9 million respectively, as opposed to $2.5 million and $3.4 million in Q1 2024. Technical services revenue hit a record $5.5 million in Q1 2025, a steep rise from $719,000 in Q1 2024. Additionally, gross margin improved to $3.2 million, up from $1.1 million last year. Net income for Q1 2025 was $1.7 million, compared to a loss of $486,000 in Q1 2024. Adjusted EBITDA stood at $1.9 million, a notable improvement from a loss of $121,000 in Q1 2024. The company's working capital increased by 14% to $14.4 million in March 2025. Operational highlights included successful water treatment operations in China and Canada, especially at the JCC-BQE and MWT-BQE joint ventures, showcasing revenue generation from sales of recovered metals and water treatment fees. The data showed decreased water volume and metal recovery due to environmental variations. Full story available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: BQE Water reports Q1 2025 earnings, with $7.4M in revenues, $5.5M from technical services, and $1.9M EBITDA. Revenues increased from Q1 2024.

news.summary: During Mental Health Awareness Month in May 2025, the Cohen Veterans Network (CVN), a national nonprofit organization, collaborated with Wounded Warrior Project to provide accessible and top-notch mental health services for veterans and military family members. The initiative was based out of Stamford, Connecticut, and aimed to reach out to a significant number of individuals in need of psychological support. This partnership exemplifies the commitment to prioritizing mental health and well-being among military personnel and their families.
news.headline: CVN partners with Wounded Warrior Project to provide mental health care for post-9/11 veterans and families. #MentalHealthAwarenessMonth

news.summary: In Cambridge, Ontario, ATS Corporation (TSX: ATS) (NYSE: ATS) confirmed that Andrew Hider, CEO, and Ryan McLeod, CFO, will attend the Stifel 2025 Cross Sector Insight Conference in Boston, MA on June 3, 2025. They will hold meetings with institutional investors at the event, which can be scheduled by contacting a Stifel representative or emailing dgalison@atsautomation.com.ATS Corporation focuses on technology solutions and services.
news.headline: ATS Corp (TSX: ATS) (NYSE: ATS) to attend Stifel 2025 Cross Sector Insight Conference in Boston on June 3, 2025. CEO and CFO will participate.

news.summary: Sportswear giant NIKE, Inc. (NYSE: NKE) is set to unveil its Q4 fiscal 2025 financial results on June 26, 2025, at about 1:15 p.m. PT after the conclusion of normal stock market trading. Subsequently, the company's management will conduct a conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT to discuss the outcomes. The call will be live-streamed on the internet and available at https://investors.nike.com/. This event offers an opportunity for stakeholders to gain insights into the company's performance.
news.headline: NIKE, Inc. (NYSE: NKE) to release Q4 fiscal 2025 results on June 26, 2025, at 1:15 p.m. PT. Conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Indianapolis, Eli Lilly and Company revealed that significant information from research on various medical treatments including orforglipron, insulin efsitora alfa, tirzepatide under the names Zepbound and Mounjaro, retatrutide, eloralintide, and bimagrumab will be showcased at the upcoming American Diabetes event. Eli Lilly's stock (NYSE: LLY) will likely be impacted by these updates in the medical field.
news.headline: Lilly to present data on various diabetes studies at ADA's 85th Scientific Sessions. Indludes Tirzepatide and Bimagrumab.

news.summary: Starlight U.S. Residential Fund reported its Q1-2025 financial results, noting an increase in normalized same property net operating income of 2.5% compared to Q1-2024. Revenue from property operations was $9,798 (down 1.3% from Q1-2024), and net operating income was $6,052 (down 3.4% from Q1-2024). The Fund reported a net loss of $24,406 in Q1-2025. They completed 55 in-suite upgrades, achieving a rental premium of $93. Economic occupancy was 94.4%, and rent collection stood at 99.3% for Q1-2025. The Fund also disclosed challenges with loan extensions for certain properties like Emerson and Sunlake. They repaid a loan with proceeds from the sale of Lyric Apartments, reducing their credit facility to $2,395. Key numbers include: 6 multi-family properties, 1,973 suites, $493,716 gross book value, $472,962 indebtedness, 94.4% economic occupancy, AMR of $1,584, and an interest rate of 6.11% as of March 31, 2025. Non-IFRS metrics like FFO and AFFO were negative, impacted by accrued interest costs. The Fund aims to manage its capital structure and leverage ratio.
news.headline: Starlight U.S. Residential Fund reports Q1-2025 results - 2.5% growth in same property NOI, $24,406 net loss, 94.4% economic occupancy.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, ThreeD Capital Inc. (CSE:IDK / OTCQX:IDKFF), a venture capital firm from Canada concentrating on investments in junior resources and disruptive technologies, released its unaudited results for the three and nine months concluding on March 31, 2025.
news.headline: ThreeD Capital Inc. released Q3 and 9-month results ended March 31, 2025; a Canadian-based firm investing in junior resources & tech sectors.

news.summary: A venture capital firm based in Los Angeles, Taste Tomorrow Ventures (TTV), has recently revealed the initial closing of its first fund, TTV Fund I, totaling $30 million. This fund aims to support early-stage ventures in the beverage, food, and snack sectors. Noteworthy strategic investors, such as Ball Corporation and Advantage Solutions, are backing the fund. TTV was founded by Danny Stepper, Dino Sarti, and Scott Guthrie, who jointly possess over eighty years of experience in the industry.
news.headline: Taste Tomorrow Ventures launches $30M fund, backed by Ball Corp. and Advantage Solutions, with first investment in Just Ice Tea. Co-founded by LA Libations founders.

FORD’S NEW ELECTRIC VEHICLE BATTERY PLANT IN MARSHALL, MICHIGAN, AND ITS PLANNED 1,700 JOBS ARE AT RISK IF CONGRESS CUTS OR ELIMINATES FEDERAL TAX CREDITS SUPPORTING CLEAN ENERGY AND BATTERY MANUFACTURING.

news.summary: Volatus Aerospace Inc. reported Q1 2025 revenue of $5,713,158, with a 32% gross margin. Adjusted EBITDA improved by 30% over Q1 2024, reaching $402,004. The company generated $1,448,565 cash from operating activities and had available cash of $1,182,611 as of March 31, 2025. They also closed a $3,000,000 LIFE Offering and announced a $2,646,000 shares-for-debt transaction post-quarter. Volatus achieved total comprehensive loss of ($4,285,320) in Q1 2025. Operational highlights include partnerships for drone operations, surpassing 75,000 flight hours, and regulatory advancements. Post-quarter highlights include national expansion, defense organization collaboration, and RPAS deployments. CEO Glen Lynch emphasized strategic steps to convert sales pipeline into revenue and mentioned plans for enhanced operational efficiency. A webinar on financial results hosted by Volatus is scheduled for June 2, 2025, at 8 am ET. Full details available on Benzinga.com for more information.
news.headline: Volatus Aerospace achieved $5.7M revenue in Q1 2025, 30% EBITDA improvement, announced $3M LIFE Offering, and expanding operations.

news.summary: Starlight U.S. Multi-Family (No. 2) Core Plus Fund announced their financial results for Q1-2025. They reported revenue from property operations of $5,435 and net operating income of $3,414, which increased by 1.7% and 4.1% respectively from Q1-2024. The Fund experienced a net loss of $10,922 for Q1-2025, attributed to fair value loss on investment properties. They completed 5 upgrades at Summermill at Falls River, generating a $212 rental premium. Economic occupancy was at 94.5% for Q1-2025, with 99.3% rent collected. The Fund owns 3 multi-family properties with a total of 995 suites. Debt amounted to $260,541, with a weighted average interest rate of 6.89%. Funds from operations were ($1,720) and adjusted funds from operations were ($704). Interest coverage ratio was 0.82x. The Fund is negotiating for loan extensions for certain properties.
news.headline: Starlight U.S. Multi-Family (No. 2) Core Plus Fund sees 4.1% year-over-year NOI growth in Q1-2025, with net loss of $10,922.
